# Gabe Bryk

> Co-Founder & CTO at GridLink (Techstars '23), building B2B EV-fleet infrastructure from the ground up. Also builds developer tools, AI agents, and self-hosted systems. Based in Chicago, IL.

## About
- Co-Founder & CTO at GridLink — multi-tenant B2B SaaS for commercial EV-fleet charging (smart-charging optimization, real-time monitoring, predictive analytics).
- Background: security engineering at ServiceNow; M.S. Cybersecurity, Illinois Institute of Technology.
- Off the clock: developer tooling, LLM agents, and self-hosted infrastructure.
